successCriteria.description: `src/modules/ping/ping.model.ts` exists and exports a `PingStatus` interface with a single field `status` of literal type `"ok"` (not `string`).
`src/modules/ping/ping.service.interface.ts` exists and exports an `IPingService` interface with a single method `getStatus(): PingStatus`, importing `PingStatus` from `./ping.model`.

`src/modules/ping/ping.service.ts` exists and exports a `PingService` class that explicitly `implements IPingService`, with `getStatus()` returning `{ status: "ok" }`. Imports `IPingService` from `./ping.service.interface` and `PingStatus` from `./ping.model`.

`src/modules/ping/index.ts` exists as a barrel export re-exporting `PingStatus` from `./ping.model`, `IPingService` from `./ping.service.interface`, and `PingService` from `./ping.service` — using the same `export { X } from './file'` syntax as `src/modules/uptime/index.ts`.

All four files use ES module syntax exclusively (no `require()`, no default exports), follow the exact structural pattern of the corresponding uptime module files, and the module has zero cross-module dependencies (imports nothing outside `src/modules/ping/`).

constraints: All four files must use ES module syntax — `import`/`export` only, no `require()`, no default exports.
The `PingStatus.status` field must be the literal string type `"ok"`, not the general `string` type.
The barrel export (`index.ts`) must use the `export { X } from './file'` re-export syntax matching `src/modules/uptime/index.ts`.
The ping module must be self-contained — zero imports from outside `src/modules/ping/`.
No persistence, no repository, no database access — the module is stateless.
outOfScope: Phase 2 — Ping routes and Fastify registration: `src/modules/ping/ping.routes.ts`, updating `src/modules/ping/index.ts` to re-export `pingRoutes`, and registering `pingRoutes` in `src/app.ts`.
Any test files (`.spec.ts` or `.test.ts`) for the ping module.
Any Fastify plugin, route handler, HTTP wiring, or `app.register()` call.
Any persistence, repository interfaces, repository implementations, SQL schemas, or database access.
Any audit logging, RBAC enforcement, input validation, or error handling — these are not applicable to this stateless value-object module and will be addressed (if needed) in the routes phase.
